user.title: Connect to Fossibot
user.description: Enter your MQTT broker settings and API token from BrightEMS app (Settings > Local MQTT Broker Settings).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Fossibot
reauth_confirm.description: Your configuration needs to be updated. Please re-enter your settings.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Please check your API token and MQTT broker settings.
